hero.headline:
44 Years of Backyards Built for
Generations
hero.subheadline: Your family deserves a backyard that brings everyone together. DesRochers has been designing and building award-winning pools across Northern Illinois since 1982 — so you can skip the stress and start making memories.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs,<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From building your dream pool to keeping it crystal clear year after year, we handle every detail so you can focus on enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Inground Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed fiberglass and vinyl liner pools built by nationally award-winning craftsmen. We guide you from the first sketch to the final splash.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks that keep your water sparkling and your pool running at peak performance all season.

cards.title: Seasonal Openings & Closings
cards.description: Professional spring openings and winterizations that protect your investment and guarantee a smooth start every swimming season.

cards.title: Fiberglass & Vinyl Repair
cards.description: Expert repairs for surface blemishes, structural issues, and liner replacements. We restore your pool to like-new condition, fast.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Authorized Caldera and Fantasy Spas dealer with models on display at all three locations. Professional delivery and installation included.

cards.title: Supplies & Water Testing
cards.description: Full retail stores stocked with BioGuard, PoolLife, and Baquacil chemicals plus free professional water testing to keep your chemistry perfect.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Visit or Call Us
steps.description: Stop by any of our three Northern Illinois locations or give us a call. We'll discuss your vision, walk you through options, and schedule a free on-site consultation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our award-winning team designs your pool to fit your yard, your style, and your budget. We handle every detail from permits to the final tile — with you involved at every step.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your backyard oasis is ready. And with our ongoing maintenance services and fully stocked retail stores, keeping it perfect is effortless for years to come.

about.label: Why Families Choose DesRochers
about.headline: Three Generations of Backyard Dreams, One Family's Promise
about.description: Since 1982, the DesRochers family has been transforming backyards across Northern Illinois into award-winning retreats. With three retail locations in Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris, we're never far away. Our staff knows your name, your pool, and exactly what it needs. That's not a tagline — it's how a family business operates after 44 years.

features.title: Award-Winning Construction
features.description: Multiple national awards for pool design and quality construction. We build to a standard most companies can't match.

features.title: Authorized Premium Dealer
features.description: Trusted partner of Latham, Caldera Spas, Pentair, and Hayward — only the best brands go into your backyard.

features.title: Full-Service, Start to Finish
features.description: We build it, maintain it, stock the chemicals, and sell the furniture. One family handles everything your pool will ever need.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets an honest, detailed quote upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just fair pricing from a family that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Happiness" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely thrilled with our work, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge. We've built our reputation over 44 years on doing what we say, and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new inground pool?
faqs.answer: Most fiberglass pools are installed in 2-4 weeks, while vinyl liner pools typically take 4-8 weeks depending on complexity. We'll give you a detailed timeline during your free consultation so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Which is better — fiberglass or vinyl liner?
faqs.answer: Both are excellent choices and we build both. Fiberglass offers faster installation and lower long-term maintenance, while vinyl gives you more shape and size flexibility at a lower upfront cost. We'll help you decide based on your yard, budget, and preferences.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for new pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several financing partners to offer flexible payment options. Visit any of our three locations to discuss financing plans that fit your budget and get pre-qualified on the spot.

faqs.question: Can you fix a pool installed by another company?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We regularly repair and restore pools installed by other builders. Whether it's fiberglass surface issues, liner replacement, or equipment problems, our team has the expertise to make it right.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Northern Illinois?
faqs.answer: We serve Wilmington, Shorewood, Morris, Joliet, Plainfield, New Lenox, Minooka, Channahon, Essex, and surrounding communities throughout Will County and Northern Illinois. With three locations, we're always nearby.

testimonials.name: Jim K.
testimonials.text: All I can say is WOW! I had a fiberglass in ground pool installed by another pool company. DesRochers didn't only fix major mistakes, they made it look brand new.

testimonials.name: John Q.
testimonials.text: The DesRochers team has been closing my pool for over 8 years with excellent customer service. Some of the best in Will County.

testimonials.name: Jennifer P.
testimonials.text: How many people give you their cell phone number? She made personal trips to my home to resolve problems. I will always be a DesRochers customer!

contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation with zero pressure. Visit any of our three locations or call us — we'll help you plan the backyard your family deserves.
